sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35366" key="e)nekplu/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνεκπλύνω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῡ]</foreign>, <sense id="n35366.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wash off</tr_> (dirt) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in</tr_> a thing, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0499.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyzel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
